description_long: This object is a large, mechanical crossbow featuring a robust wooden frame and a prominent, elongated metal bolt loaded at the front. The arms of the crossbow are wide and angular, constructed from a brown material that resembles wood, and are reinforced with metallic components. A taut string is attached to the ends of the arms, ready to launch the heavy, conical-tipped projectile. The central body houses a winding mechanism and a sturdy support base, suggesting it is designed for stationary use rather than handheld operation. The metallic bolt is oversized, with a pointed tip and a cylindrical shaft, indicating it is intended for high-impact, long-range firing. The overall construction is utilitarian, with exposed mechanical parts and a focus on durability and power.
description: A large, stationary crossbow with a wooden frame, metal reinforcements, and a heavy, pointed metal bolt loaded at the front. The design is robust and mechanical, featuring a winding mechanism and a wide support base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the crossbow's wooden frame, winding mechanism, and the full length of the loaded metal bolt.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide arms, taut string, and the pointed tip of the metal bolt aimed forward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the frame, winding mechanism, and the rear support base.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the crossbow's symmetrical arms, central body, and the alignment of the bolt with the firing mechanism.
